top_signals.title: AI boom reshuffles global stock market pecking order as South Korea and Taiwan surge
top_signals.summary: A global reshuffling in stock-market hierarchy is underway. AI is propelling Taiwan and South Korea past a couple long-established Western countries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pentagon inks $500 million deal with Perennial Autonomy for counter-drone tech
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon awarded Perennial Autonomy a $500 million contract to accelerate procurement of counter-drone technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Discord rolls out end-to-end encryption on voice, video calls
top_signals.summary: Discord announced that all voice and video calls through the communication platform are now protected by default with end-to-end encryption (E2EE). [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Indonesian Markets Extend Fall on Government Export Control Plan
top_signals.summary: Indonesian markets extended losses into a second day, as plans to tighten control over commodity exports stoked fears of increased state control and weaker profitability in a key industry.
